# PR Checklist for EPIC-11 Code Review

Use this template when submitting a pull request that implements EPIC-11 features.  It ensures the peer review focuses on the required quality gates before merging.

- [ ] **Description**: Briefly summarize what EPIC-11 functionality is added/changed.
- [ ] **Linked Issues**: Add issue numbers for EPIC-11 tasks.
- [ ] **Test Coverage**: All new code has corresponding unit/integration tests.
- [ ] **Docs Updated**: Any public APIs, migrations, or docs are updated.
- [ ] **Migration**: Database migrations reviewed and idempotent.
- [ ] **Performance**: Benchmarked against AC-3 or stated assumptions.
- [ ] **Security**: Any input validation / injection vectors covered.
- [ ] **Reviewers Assigned**: @DevA and @DevC (per recommendation).

> After approval, merge only once EPIC-14 decision is confirmed and Monday kickoff completed.
